display_text: Observer Ward, Cost: 0: Places an invisible Observer Ward that provides 1600 radius ground vision to your team, lasting 6 minutes. Holds a single charge that replenishes over time at the shop. Critical for map control and information. Stats: CD: 1s, Duration: 360s, Vision: 1600, HP: 200.

display_text: Observer Ward, Cost: 0: Essential early game consumable for lane safety and rune control. Provides vision to avoid ganks and secure last hits safely. Supports primarily purchase these for team-wide map awareness.

display_text: Observer Ward, Cost: 0: Use to secure Roshan pit vision, spot enemy rotations through jungle chokepoints, and deward high-ground cliffs for push defense. The single charge mechanic forces strategic placement decisions.
